text:
Author: maxim
Date: Mon Mar 25 12:38:45 2013
New Revision: 248700
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/base/248700

Log:
  o Typo: IEE -> IEEE.
  
  PR:		docs/173069
  Submitted by:	Bjorn Heidotting
  MFC after:	1 week

Modified:
  head/sbin/geom/class/eli/geli.8

Modified: head/sbin/geom/class/eli/geli.8
==============================================================================
--- head/sbin/geom/class/eli/geli.8	Mon Mar 25 09:43:50 2013	(r248699)
+++ head/sbin/geom/class/eli/geli.8	Mon Mar 25 12:38:45 2013	(r248700)
@@ -970,7 +970,7 @@ Enter passphrase:
 supports two encryption modes:
 .Nm XTS ,
 which was standardized as
-.Nm IEE P1619
+.Nm IEEE P1619
 and
 .Nm CBC
 with unpredictable IV.
